The countryside is full of stories to tell and tales, as they say around the world, but for us it's just "caus," simple as that. And to better understand the stories of this vast interior, there are the projects of Rede Globo affiliates, "Causas do Interior" (Causes of the Interior). It's a way to keep the folklore of our land alive, and it's an opportunity for your brand to appear; who knows, it might even become a legend here too. The interior is a richness that accounts for 15% of Brazil's gross domestic product, equivalent to the wealth produced in Portugal. Just so you have an idea, if it were a country, it would be the 26th largest economy in the world.
